name: qmemd
description: Durable memory engine for Codex — remember/recall/forget over markdown facts, with a SessionStart snapshot + PreToolUse beacon.

interface.longDescription: Durable memory engine over markdown facts. Bundles the qmemd MCP server (remember/recall/forget), the qmemd-memory skill, and lifecycle hooks that inject a SessionStart memory snapshot and a PreToolUse memory-presence beacon — the same behaviour qmemd ships for Claude Code.
defaultPrompt: Recall what we know about this repo before diagnosing.
Remember this as a durable project fact.
